summary: EXP-298 written. Patches WIN-028 detail_evidence to neutralize WIN-028.c4 defender pivot (defense_survives=3). Three changes address the defender claims: (1) reframes 180° as our charitable steelman not a dome attribution; computes |152-180|=|208-180|=28° to show arc choice does not change the deviation; (2) anchors 15.6% to the dome's own 5.3% confirmation pattern in WIN-029 (verbatim cite from raw-text/02-wins.txt) plus WIN-027 R²=0.7874 and WIN-030 48.6%; (3) adds an explicit unfalsifiability pivot — without a published tolerance the WIN cannot be CONFIRMED in any framework that distinguishes confirmation from compatibility, including the dome's own. Acknowledges the kernel of truth (the regions ARE near-opposite at 152° short-arc) before showing why the WIN still fails on mechanism (agonic lines do not pass through either region per IGRF-13/WMM 2025) and on the disappearance phenomenon itself (NOAA/Lloyd's/USCG). Verdict (Refuted by Data) unchanged. TLDR unchanged.
